; Mitchell Scott (https://github.com/rmitchellscott)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-05-06T23:17:34Z

AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[8400407604831274538]]
REPLACE [[233748328658231]] WITH {
~&233748328658231&~: ~&254547437090201330&~.~&13501484030617440462&~ && ~&233725063921183&~
}
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
